explanation: This command simulates the suspicious use of the New-MailboxExportRequest cmdlet to export a mailbox to a remote share, as detected by the Sigma rule. It includes all required elements for detection.
This command adds an optional argument (-WindowStyle Hidden) that does not affect the detection logic but demonstrates how arguments can be extended while still matching the Sigma rule.
This command omits unnecessary elements and adds a common PowerShell flag (-NoProfile) to demonstrate reordering and omission techniques while still matching the Sigma rule.
This command uses insertion of an additional empty -Command parameter, which is parsed correctly and does not affect the detection logic.
This command uses substitution of an empty string for the second -Command parameter, demonstrating safe mutation techniques while still matching the Sigma rule.
